name: colloquial-lollipop
description: Edge case: colloquial chart type name — lollipop chart
messages: Make a lollipop chart of average score by subject
rubric: A lollipop chart is a dot+rule combination (dot at value, thin line from baseline to dot). The model should approximate this using supported marks: ruleY for stems + dot for circles, or tickY + dot. Acceptable alternative: bar chart with acknowledgment that lollipop isn't native. FAIL if model declines entirely. FAIL if model renders a plain bar chart without acknowledging the lollipop request or attempting the dot+rule composition.
